case_title: BIRDSONG, BOBBIE et al VS WALKER, JOHN MD

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY BIRDSONG, BOBBIE HART, DEIRDRE A. AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, JOHN MD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-18-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
